text: This concept has been verified in animal models and there is extensive evidence that this concept is valid in humans as well (Banchereau & Steinman, 1998; Miller & Inoue, 1999; Rossi & Zlotnik, 2000; Maloy & Powrie, 2001; Matsumoto & Okada, 2002; Harvey & Khera, 2006; Forster & Davalos-Misslitz, 2008; Borsellino & Patrucco, 2009; Sauter & Schall, 2010; Lund & Denecker, 2013).
